title: PDF auto-trim + visible crop panel
description:
PDF import now reads CropBox/TrimBox and auto-trims page whitespace (same as manual Refine edges). Existing viewer sheets backfill crop insets on open. Refine edges panel styled fixed bottom-right (was unstyled/buried). Fixed viewer page build footprint bug.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg67).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Auto-trim PDF whitespace at split/import from CropBox/TrimBox.
Viewer backfill detects crop on open for older uploads.
Refine edges panel visible bottom-right with proper styling.
Viewer stack reflow after auto-trim removes grey dead space.
